videos.headline: Riley Leonard plows into end zone for TD on opening drive
videos.description: Notre Dame takes an early lead as Riley Leonard gets the quarterback sneak for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Navy's first lost fumble of the season comes after a botched pitch
videos.description: Navy's running back Alex Tecza drops the pitch, and it's picked up by Notre Dame's Adon Shuler for a turnover.
